steps.title: Identify the relationship between population, density, and area
steps.content: Population density is defined as population divided by area. Rearranging to solve for area:

steps.title: Substitute the given values and divide
steps.content:
With population = 85,100 and population density = 230 people per square mile:
$$\text{Area} = \frac{85,100}{230}$$
Performing the division: $85,100 \div 230 = 370$

The area of Cedar County is 370 square miles.
